notes:
Standard SM-era 10-card pack (4 common + 3 uncommon + 1 reverse-holo filler + 1 rare-or-better + 1 basic energy not modeled). Only the rare-or-better slot drives EV.

VERIFICATION OF SOURCES (re-fetched independently):
- ThePriceDex sm12 pull-rate table FULLY confirmed. The complete table contains ALL rows the draft cited verbatim: Rare Holo 5.2/box (1:6.9), Rare Holo GX 4.6/box (1:7.8), Character Rare 3.6/box (1:10), Ultra Rare full-art 1.4/box (1:26.2), Rainbow Rare 0.5/box (1:71.4), Secret Rare 0.3/box (1:111.1), plus a generic non-holo Rare row at 24/box (1:1.5). My first partial fetch only surfaced 4 rows and looked like the Character Rare / Ultra Rare rows were missing, but a targeted re-fetch confirmed they exist exactly as cited. Draft did NOT fabricate these numbers.
- Flipside Gaming confirmed as era-baseline cross-check: GX ~1:9, full-art UR 1:18-36, secret ~1:2 boxes (~1:72). All draft figures fall inside these ranges.
- ToyWiz confirmed 36-pack booster box, 10 cards + 1 energy per pack.
- ETB pack count: the draft's Pokemon Center URL returned a bot-detection page (unfetchable), so I REPLACED it with the official pokemon.com product-gallery page, which fetched cleanly and states "8 booster packs." 8-pack ETB also corroborated via WebSearch across multiple retailers.

VALUE-SLOT DERIVATION (rare-or-better fires 36x/box): premium rows sum to 5.2+4.6+3.6+1.4+0.5+0.3 = 15.6/box. Remaining non-holo rares in the value slot = 36 - 15.6 = 20.4/box (the 24/box generic Rare row cannot fit a single 36-slot/box channel, so subtraction is the correct reconciliation). Confirmed the subtraction approach is sound.

COARSE-BUCKET MAPPING (per engine rules - holo+non-holo rare => rare; GX + full-art Pokemon + full-art/character Trainer => ultra-rare; rainbow+gold+secret => secret-rare):
  rare        = (non-holo 20.4 + Rare Holo 5.2)/36 = 25.6/36 = 0.7111
  ultra-rare  = (GX 4.6 + Character Rare 3.6 + UR full-art 1.4)/36 = 9.6/36 = 0.2667
  secret-rare = (Rainbow 0.5 + Secret/Gold 0.3)/36 = 0.8/36 = 0.0222
Character Rare = full-art character/trainer cards (Cynthia & Caitlin FA, Rosa FA, alt-art Tag Team GX) => correctly maps to ultra-rare. Verified.

Distribution sum check: 0.7111+0.2667+0.0222 = 1.0000 EXACT. Filler/reverse slots also sum to 1.0. All keys (common, uncommon, rare, ultra-rare, secret-rare) are within this set's available buckets. No shiny-rare (standard set, not Hidden Fates).

CONFIDENCE = LOW: ThePriceDex is a community-estimate model with no published sample size, CI, or methodology; used as the sole per-set quantitative source, sanity-checked against the SM-era average only.
